stratosphere.$description: Stratosphere — Hero and section atmospheric backgrounds, sky gradient origin, the signature non-neutral surface that carries brand mood

jetstream-blue.$description: Jetstream Blue — Outlined/ghost action borders, link text, image accent borders — the only chromatic accent, used as outlined-link color and focused-frame treatment, never as a filled button background

onyx.$description: Onyx — Primary text, structural borders, footer background, partner logo fills

cloud.$description: Cloud — Inverse text on dark and gradient backgrounds, content section canvas, navigation text on hero, gradient endpoint

neuehaastext.$description: NeueHaasText — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

neuehaasgroteskdisplay.$description: Monumental display headlines (ES-30 wordmark, section showstoppers) — the weight 600 at 156px with -0.02em tracking is the brand's signature voice, engineered for aerospace-scale moments that fill the viewport

neuehaasgrotesktext.$description: All UI and body text — navigation links, body copy, footer links, captions. Weight 400 is the default reading voice; weight 600 for subheadings and emphasized nav. The -0.01em tracking at 18px is subtle but consistent — tighter than browser default, which is the Ne Haas family hallmark

neuehaasdisplay.$description: NeueHaasDisplay — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

atmospheric-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Full-bleed hero and feature sections — the gradient origin for sky photography overlays

cloud-canvas.$description: Surface level 1: Content sections below the fold — partner grids, article bodies, secondary pages

onyx-footer.$description: Surface level 2: Terminal footer surface for navigation, social, and address columns
